videos.headline: Kyle Williams is wide open for a WSU TD
videos.description: Washington State takes the early 7-0 lead as Kyle Williams fools the Wisconsin defense for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kyle Williams is wide open for a WSU TD) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Washington State uses big drive to score TD
videos.description: Washington State has two big plays to get them to the 1-yard line. Then they cap it off with a short touchdown pass to Lincoln Victor.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Washington State uses big drive to score TD) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Washington State takes over as they knock the ball away from Mordecai
videos.description: Washington State's Chris Jackson knocks the ball loose from Tanner Mordecai, and Ron Stone Jr. picks it up for the turnover.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Washington State takes over as they knock the ball away from Mordecai) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Washington State gets the scoop and score to extend the lead
videos.description: Washington State's Ron Stone Jr. knocks it loose from Tanner Mordecai and it's picked up by Brennan Jackson for the touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Washington State gets the scoop and score to extend the lead) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Chez Mellusi walks into end zone for a Wisconsin TD
videos.description: Wisconsin gets its first touchdown of the day as Chez Mellusi takes the pitch and scores.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Chez Mellusi walks into end zone for a Wisconsin TD) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Mordecai makes a spectacular throw for a Wisconsin TD
videos.description: Tanner Mordecai somehow avoids the sack and still slings it to Skyler Bell for a 16-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Mordecai makes a spectacular throw for a Wisconsin TD) 2023/09/09 ESHEET
